homePage.heroDesc: Aimin connects AI directly to your WhatsApp — replying instantly, qualifying leads, and handing off complex issues to your team. Always on. Always accurate.
homePage.capabilitiesTitle: Built for businesses that can't afford to wait.
homePage.feature1Desc: Replies instantly, 24/7 — with deep understanding of your products, tone, and language.
homePage.feature2Desc: Built on the WhatsApp Business API. Works where your customers already are.
homePage.feature3Desc: Real-time dashboards showing response rates, conversion funnels, and team performance.
homePage.feature4Desc: AI handles routine questions. Complex ones escalate to your team in one tap.
homePage.feature5Desc: Upload catalogs, FAQs, and policies. The AI answers only from your verified content.
homePage.feature6Desc: Every conversation, order, and preference — stored, searchable, and actionable.
homePage.analyticsTitle: Data that tells you exactly where to grow next.
homePage.analyticsDesc: Our dashboard surfaces what matters — peak hours, drop-off points, top-performing responses, and team efficiency — so every decision is backed by real numbers.
homePage.analyticsItem1: Response time tracking down to the second
homePage.analyticsItem2: Conversion funnel from first message to sale
homePage.analyticsItem3: Peak hour heatmaps to optimize staffing
homePage.testimonial1Quote: Response times dropped from hours to seconds. Our sales increased 40% in the first month alone.
homePage.testimonial2Quote: The AI understands Indonesian context perfectly. It's like having a full-time customer service agent that never sleeps.
homePage.testimonial3Quote: The analytics completely changed how we operate. We can see every conversion, every drop-off, in real time.
homePage.ctaDesc: Start your free trial today. No credit card required. Full features. Cancel anytime.
